markets.question: Los Angeles Galaxy vs. Sporting Kansas City: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Los Angeles Galaxy and Sporting Kansas City, scheduled for March 14 at 9:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Los Angeles Galaxy and Sporting Kansas City combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on mlssoccer.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

markets.question: Los Angeles Galaxy vs. Sporting Kansas City: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Los Angeles Galaxy and Sporting Kansas City, scheduled for March 14 at 9:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Los Angeles Galaxy and Sporting Kansas City each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).
